issues.title: Canonical URLs are relative paths
issues.fix: All canonical hrefs now use absUrl() from seo.ts to output fully-qualified URLs

issues.title: og:url values are relative paths
issues.fix: All og:url values now use absUrl() for fully-qualified URLs

issues.title: No canonical link on root page
issues.fix: Added canonical link in __root.tsx head()

issues.title: No og:url on root page
issues.fix: Added og:url with absUrl('/') in __root.tsx head()

issues.title: Google Search Console verification missing
issues.fix: Already verified via DNS TXT record - no meta tag needed

issues.title: Duplicate absUrl logic in share-button.tsx and discovery.ts
issues.fix: Both now import from centralized @/lib/seo

issues.title: og:type is 'article' on category pages (should be 'website')
issues.fix: Changed to 'website' in category.$slug.tsx

issues.title: og:type is 'article' on learn pages (should be 'website')
issues.fix: Changed to 'website' in learn.$topic.tsx

issues.title: Invalid hreflang for Russian (site is English-only)
issues.fix: Removed og:locale:alternate ru_RU from __root.tsx

issues.title: No noindex on /qr page (thin content)
issues.fix: Added noindex, nofollow meta to qr.tsx

issues.title: meta keywords tag present (unused by modern engines)
issues.fix: Removed from __root.tsx, daily.tsx, learn.$topic.tsx, maruf.tsx

issues.title: Sitemap missing lastmod dates
issues.fix: Added dynamic <lastmod> with today's date in sitemap.xml.ts

issues.title: Sitemap uses request origin instead of SITE_ORIGIN
issues.fix: Now uses SITE_ORIGIN constant from seo.ts

issues.title: robots.txt missing Disallow for API paths
issues.fix: Added Disallow: /api/ and Googlebot-specific section

issues.title: Google Fonts @import is render-blocking
issues.note: Added preconnect hints; display=swap already present. Full self-hosting deferred.

issues.title: og:image uses GitHub avatar URL
issues.note: Acceptable for now; dedicated OG image can be added later

issues.title: Google Fonts @import blocks rendering
issues.fix: Added preconnect to fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com in __root.tsx links; display=swap already in CSS

issues.title: 36 unused shadcn/ui components increase bundle
issues.fix: Removed 40 unused UI components, kept only sonner, button, card, badge, skeleton, dialog

issues.title: Unused npm dependencies (cmdk, recharts, zod, etc.)
issues.fix: Removed 11 unused deps and 24 unused @radix-ui packages from package.json

issues.title: Framer Motion adds ~62KB to SSR bundle
issues.note: Brand identity - animations must not be modified per user requirement

issues.title: Cloudflare beacon adds cache overhead
issues.note: Cloudflare platform behavior, not fixable in app code

issues.title: Footer headings use h4 instead of h2
issues.fix: Changed all h4 to h2 with proper id and aria-labelledby in layout.tsx

issues.title: ScrollProgress bar lacks ARIA role
issues.fix: Added role=progressbar with aria-label, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuenow

issues.title: Footer sections lack aria-labelledby
issues.fix: Added aria-labelledby to each footer div section

issues.title: Share buttons may appear excessive to automated tools
issues.note: Legitimate UX feature - each resource card needs its own share button per user requirement

issues.title: No Content-Security-Policy header
issues.fix: Added CSP in public/_headers for Cloudflare Pages, whitelisting GTM + GA + Google Fonts

issues.title: No X-Frame-Options header
issues.fix: Added X-Frame-Options: DENY in public/_headers

issues.title: No X-Content-Type-Options header
issues.fix: Added X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff in public/_headers

issues.title: No Referrer-Policy header
issues.fix: Added Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin in public/_headers

issues.title: No Permissions-Policy header
issues.fix: Added Permissions-Policy denying camera, microphone, geolocation in public/_headers

issues.title: package.json name is 'tanstack_start_ts'
issues.fix: Renamed to 'rusource'

issues.title: Directory typo: src/assests should be src/assets
issues.fix: Renamed directory and updated imports in qr.tsx and qr[.]png.ts

issues.title: JSON-LD URLs are relative paths
issues.fix: Updated all structured data URLs to use absUrl()

issues.title: SearchAction target URL uses relative path
issues.fix: Updated urlTemplate to use absUrl()

issues.title: Animations used for brand identity
issues.note: User explicitly requested no animation changes

issues.title: Missing security headers (CSP, XFO, XCTO, RP, PP)
issues.fix: All added via public/_headers for Cloudflare Pages

issues.title: CSP must whitelist GTM domains
issues.fix: CSP includes googletagmanager.com and google-analytics.com in script-src/connect-src

issues.title: No HSTS header
issues.note: Cloudflare enforces HTTPS automatically on custom domains

issues.title: X-XSS-Protection is legacy
issues.note: Added anyway for legacy browser coverage; modern browsers rely on CSP

todos.title: Install Google Tag Manager (GTM-TFRFRL8Q)
todos.fix: GTM head snippet + noscript body fallback added to __root.tsx

todos.title: Google Search Console verification
todos.fix: Already verified via DNS TXT record

build_verification.notes: Build completes with zero errors. CF Workers output generated in dist/.
